endocrine_metabolic_core.title: Endocrine and Metabolic Core Vocabulary v1
endocrine_metabolic_core.source: project-curated high-frequency endocrine/metabolic disease phenotype and biomarker checklist

details.label: prediabetes
details.ambiguity_notes: Prediabetes is a risk state and should not be expanded to established type 2 diabetes without explicit wording.

details.label: body mass index
details.ambiguity_notes: BMI is an anthropometric index, not a disease.

details.label: low HDL cholesterol
expected_terms: 低高密度脂蛋白胆固醇
matched_terms: 低高密度脂蛋白胆固醇
details.ambiguity_notes: HDL alone is a biomarker token and should not imply disease without low/high context.

details.label: high LDL cholesterol
expected_terms: 高低密度脂蛋白胆固醇
matched_terms: 高低密度脂蛋白胆固醇
details.ambiguity_notes: LDL alone is a biomarker token and should not imply disease without low/high context.

details.label: metabolic dysfunction-associated steatotic liver disease
expected_terms: 代谢功能障碍相关脂肪性肝病
metabolic dysfunction associated steatotic liver disease
matched_terms: 代谢功能障碍相关脂肪性肝病
metabolic dysfunction associated steatotic liver disease

details.label: Hashimoto thyroiditis
expected_terms: 慢性淋巴细胞性甲状腺炎
matched_terms: 慢性淋巴细胞性甲状腺炎
details.ambiguity_notes: Hashimoto thyroiditis can cause hypothyroidism but should not be collapsed into hypothyroidism.

details.label: Graves disease
details.ambiguity_notes: Graves disease is related to hyperthyroidism but should not be collapsed into hyperthyroidism.

details.label: thyroid nodule
details.ambiguity_notes: Thyroid nodule is not automatically thyroid cancer.

details.label: Addison disease
expected_terms: 原发性肾上腺皮质功能减退
matched_terms: 原发性肾上腺皮质功能减退

details.label: adiponectin
details.ambiguity_notes: Adiponectin is an adipokine biomarker, not a disease.

details.label: triiodothyronine
details.ambiguity_notes: T3 is a short token; runtime matching requires token boundary.

details.label: thyroxine
details.ambiguity_notes: T4 is a short token; runtime matching requires token boundary.

details.label: free triiodothyronine
expected_terms: 游离三碘甲状腺原氨酸
matched_terms: 游离三碘甲状腺原氨酸

details.label: thyroid peroxidase antibody
expected_terms: 甲状腺过氧化物酶抗体
抗甲状腺过氧化物酶抗体
matched_terms: 甲状腺过氧化物酶抗体
抗甲状腺过氧化物酶抗体

high_risk_ambiguity_terms.policy: map only as exact token for type 1 diabetes
map only as exact token for type 2 diabetes
require token boundary; do not match STAT3 or similar strings
require token boundary; do not match unrelated alphanumeric strings
biomarker/phenotype only, not obesity by itself
biomarker token; low HDL is phenotype
biomarker token; high LDL is phenotype
do not expand to HCC or LIHC
do not expand to HCC or LIHC
do not expand to HCC or LIHC

oncology_core.title: Oncology Core Vocabulary v1 Checklist
oncology_core.source: BioMedPilot curated oncology core based on TCGA/GDC project labels, common translational oncology concepts, and MeSH heading names

details.label: colon cancer
avoid_expansion_to: rectal cancer unless colorectal context is explicit

details.label: head and neck squamous cell carcinoma
expected_terms: head and neck squamous cell carcinoma
matched_terms: head and neck squamous cell carcinoma

details.label: rectal cancer
avoid_expansion_to: colon cancer unless colorectal context is explicit

details.label: large cell lung carcinoma
details.parent_concept: lung cancer, non-small cell lung cancer

details.label: acute lymphoblastic leukemia
expected_terms: 急性淋巴母细胞白血病
matched_terms: 急性淋巴母细胞白血病
details.confusion_notes: ALL is an oncology abbreviation but should be treated cautiously outside hematology context.

details.label: cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma
avoid_expansion_to: head and neck squamous cell carcinoma
details.confusion_notes: SCC alone is ambiguous and should not strongly expand without an anatomic site.

details.label: 小细胞肺癌
details.confusion_notes: Small cell lung cancer is a high-value lung subtype but not represented as a TCGA project in the core 33.

details.label: 多发性骨髓瘤
details.confusion_notes: MM is useful in oncology but should be interpreted with context outside cancer queries.

details.label: 脑膜瘤
details.confusion_notes: Meningioma should not be collapsed into glioma.

high_risk_ambiguity_terms.risk: squamous cell carcinoma without anatomic site
high_risk_ambiguity_terms.policy: do not strongly expand without site context

high_risk_ambiguity_terms.risk: renal cell carcinoma abbreviation without subtype
high_risk_ambiguity_terms.policy: do not expand to all kidney cancer subtypes from RCC alone

high_risk_ambiguity_terms.risk: mostly papillary thyroid carcinoma in oncology but can be non-oncology outside context
high_risk_ambiguity_terms.policy: allow oncology mapping but keep leakage tests
maps to colorectal parent, not isolated colon or rectal subtype

high_risk_ambiguity_terms.risk: multiple myeloma abbreviation can be non-oncology outside context
high_risk_ambiguity_terms.policy: prefer oncology mapping only with cancer or hematology context

tcga_projects.source_version: TCGA project abbreviations list, curated access 2026-05

details.label: Cervical Squamous Cell Carcinoma and Endocervical Adenocarcinoma
Lymphoid Neoplasm Diffuse Large B-cell Lymphoma
Head and Neck Squamous Cell Carcinoma
expected_terms: head and neck squamous cell carcinoma
matched_terms: head and neck squamous cell carcinoma

gates.description: Common cancer checklist coverage must stay >= 95%.
TCGA project checklist coverage must stay >= 90%.
GTEx tissue weighted coverage must stay >= 95%.
Meta outcome, design, effect-size, and publication filter terms must stay >= 90%.
Oncology core checklist coverage must stay >= 95%.
Oncology core must cover all TCGA 33 project candidates.
Endocrine/metabolic core checklist coverage must stay >= 95%.
Endocrine/metabolic core should not have missing expected terms.
Reference checklist missing count must remain zero.
Meta audit details must not report TCGA or GTEx matches.
